zh.lifeSummary: 當Hannah Strong於1659年5月30日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德溫莎女爵時，她的父親Elder John Strong53歲，母親Abigail Ford11656歲。她於1680年6月15日與William Clark Jr.在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾諾薩普頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1694年1月31日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾諾薩普頓享年34歲，埋葬在美國康乃狄克州劍橋大學默里 倫敦勒班農笛卡爾 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hannah Strong于1659年5月30日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德溫莎女爵时，她的父亲Elder John Strong53岁，母亲Abigail Ford11656岁。她于1680年6月15日与William Clark Jr.在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾諾薩普頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1694年1月31日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾諾薩普頓享年34岁，埋葬在美国康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦勒班農笛卡爾 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Strong
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English strong(e), strang(e) ‘strong, powerful’ (Old English strang).
Americanized form (translation into English) of Jewish   Stark  .

variants.name: Strang
meanings: German: topographic name from Middle High German stranc ‘strip of land’, or a habitational name from any of the places so called.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): metonymic occupational name for a rope maker, from Middle High German stranc, German Strang ‘cord, rope’.

variants.name: Trehan
meanings: Indian: Sikh name, from a name of a sub-caste of Khatris.

Channel Islands (Jersey): occupational name, a variant of French Trahand, from a derivative of French traire ‘to draw or stretch’, for a silk worker whose job was to draw out the thread from cocoons. In Britain it has sometimes been ‘translated’ into English as Strong .

variants.name: Trahan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Marcel, Monique, Pierre, Leonce, Lucien, Alcide, Cecile, Emile, Adrien, Camille.

French: variant of Trahant or Trahand (and, in North America, an altered form of the former), a metonymic occupational name for a silkworker who drew out the thread from the cocoons, from a derivative of the verb traire ‘to draw or stretch’. Compare Strong .

History: The LA branches of the Trahan family trace their descent from Guillaume Trahan, from Montreuil-Bellay in Maine-et-Loire, who arrived in Acadia in the 17th century; he married Madeleine Brun in Port-Royal in Acadia (now Annapolis Royal in NS, Canada), c. 1666. At the time of the expulsion of the Acadians (1755–64), his numerous descendants were deported and finally settled principally in the Attakapas country of LA.

nameMeanings.name: Hannah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the mother of the prophet Samuel (1 Samuel 1:2), Hebrew Hanna. It is derived from a Hebrew word meaning ‘He (i.e. God) has favoured me (i.e. with a child)’. See also Anne . This form of the name was taken up as a given name by the Puritans in the 16th and 17th centuries and remained popular until the late 19th century. Thereafter it fell somewhat from favour but has enjoyed a massive revival since the 1990s.

variants.name: Hanna
meanings: Either the biblical name ( see Hannah ) or a short form of Johanna .

variants.name: Hana
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.description: The first three settlers were: Henry Denslow 1663, Nathaniel Gaylord-1678, and Abraham Dibble - 1708.
New London County was one of four original counties in Connecticut that were established on May 10, 1666

en.lifeSummary: When Hannah Strong was born on 30 May 1659, in Windsor, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Elder John Strong, was 53 and her mother, Abigail Ford, was 11656. She married William Clark Jr. on 15 June 1680, in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 31 January 1694, in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 34, and was buried in Old Cemetery, Lebanon, New London, Connecticut, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hannah Strong est née le 30 mai 1659, à Windsor, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Elder John Strong, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Abigail Ford, avait 11656 ans. Elle a épousé William Clark Jr. le 15 juin 1680, à Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 31 janvier 1694, à Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterrée à Old Cemetery, Lebanon, New London, Connecticut, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hannah Strong am 30. Mai 1659 in Windsor, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Elder John Strong 53 und ihre Mutter Abigail Ford 11656. Sie hat am 15. Juni 1680 in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America William Clark Jr. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 31. Januar 1694 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Old Cemetery, Lebanon, New London, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hannah Strong è nata il il 30 maggio 1659 nel Windsor, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Elder John Strong, aveva 53 anni e sua madre, Abigail Ford, aveva 11656 anni. Lei sposato William Clark Jr. il 15 giugno 1680, nel Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 31 gennaio 1694, nel Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 34 anni, e fu sepolta a Old Cemetery, Lebanon, New London, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Hannah Strongが1659年5月30日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードウィンドソルで生まれた時，父Elder John Strongは53歳，母Abigail Fordは11656歳であった。1680年6月15日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアノーサンプトンでWilliam Clark Jr.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1694年1月31日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアノーサンプトンで34歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ニュー ロンドンレバノンオルド セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hannah Strong(이)가 1659년 5월 30일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 윈드소르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Elder John Strong(은)는 53세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Abigail Ford(은)는 11656세였다. 그녀는 1680년 6월 15일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 노르섬프턴에서 William Clark Jr.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1694년 1월 31일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 노르섬프턴에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 레바넌 드 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hannah Strong nasceu em 30 de maio de 1659, em Windsor, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America, seu pai, Elder John Strong, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Abigail Ford, tinha 11656 anos. Ela casou-se com William Clark Jr. em 15 de junho de 1680, em Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 31 de janeiro de 1694, em Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 34 anos, e foi sepultada em Old Cemetery, Lebanon, New London, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hannah Strong родилась 30 мая 1659 г. в местности виндзор, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Elder John Strong было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Abigail Ford, 11656. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Clark Jr. 15 июня 1680 г. в местности нортамптон, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 31 января 1694 г. в местности нортамптон, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 34 лет и была похоронена в местности олд кеметири, лебанон, ню лондон, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hannah Strong nació el 30 de mayo de 1659, en Windsor, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Elder John Strong, tenía 53 años y su mamá, Abigail Ford, tenía 11656 años. Se casó con William Clark Jr. el 15 de junio de 1680, en Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 31 de enero de 1694, en Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 34 años, y fue sepultada en Old Cemetery, Lebanon, New London, Connecticut, Estados Unidos.
